title: The Crafterlife SMP
description: The recommended default Modpack for the Crafterlife SMP.
body:
The recommended default Modpack for the Crafterlife SMP!

Contains mostly lightweight client-side mods.

The most notable mods are Simple Voice Chat (allowing in-game voice chat), AppleSkin (which makes the hunger bar provide more information about saturation, and the food you're holding), and Zoomify (which allows you to zoom in).

The Modpack also includes some off-by-default mostly cosmetic mods that you can enable to make Minecraft look/play a little better.

This Modpack was created for users of the Crafterlife SMP. It is not required to play on the server, but it is recommended! If you aren’t a member of the server, you can feel free to use it as well, it would hopefully make a good base pack for a client-side Modpack.

Useful default keybindings:

- Push to talk: Caps Lock
- Voice Chat Menu: V
- Zoom in: C
